entry.title: Rest风格轻松入门
entry.content:
三步走——如何将Web端请求转换为Rest风格

1 传统

@Controller
public class UserController {

    @RequestMapping("/save")
    @ResponseBody
    public String save(){
        System.out.println("save running ...");
        return "save runnning";
    }

    @RequestMapping("/delete")
    @ResponseBody
    public String Delete(Integer id){
        System.out.println("delete running ..."+id);
        return "delete running";
    }

    @RequestMapping("/update")
    @ResponseBody
    public String update(@RequestBody User user){
        System.out.println("update running ..."+user);
        return "update running";
    }

    @RequestMapping("/select")
    @ResponseBody
    public String selectAll(){
        System.out.println("select running ...");
        return "select running";
    }

    @RequestMapping("selectById")
    @ResponseBody
    public String selectById(Integer id){
        System.out.println("select running ..."+id);
        return "selectById running";
    }

}

2 改造

  1. 将 @RequestMapper中访问的地址统一

    • 不含传递参数/含 json类参数：使用统一的根目录地址

      @RequestMapping(value = "/users")  
//具体方法

 /*访问地址为:http://localhost:8080/users*/

    • 含单个参数：使用restful大括号

      @RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}")  
//具体方法
	...
 /*访问地址为:http://localhost:8080/users*/

  2. 根据不同操作使用不同的请求提交方式

    • 增加：POST

    • 删除：DELETE

    • 修改（更新）：PUT

    • 查找：GET

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.POST)
@ResponceBody
//1.增加方法
	...
@RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}",method = RequestMethod.DELETE)
@ResponceBody
//2.删除方法
	...        
@RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.PUT)
@ResponceBody
//3.更新方法
	...
@RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.GET)
@ResponceBody
//4.1 全体查询
	...
@RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}",method = RequestMethod.GET)
@ResponceBody
//4.2 根据条件查询
	...

  3. 根据请求所发送的数据类型对接受数据进行注释

    • @RequestBody：接收用 json数据类型进行包装的 pojo类，要求接受的pojo类属性名要与json数据的key值一致

      @RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.PUT)
@ResponseBody
//3.更新方法
public String update(@RequestBody User user){
	...	
}

    • @PathVariable：路径变量，接受由Restful括号传来的参数，要求变量名要与括号内参数名一致

      @RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}",method = RequestMethod.DELETE)
@ResponseBody
//2.删除方法
public String Delete(@PathVariable Integer id){
	...
}

  4. 修改后结果

    @Controller
public class UserController {

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.POST)
    @ResponseBody
    //1.增加方法
    public String save(){
        System.out.println("save running ...");
        return "save runnning";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}",method = RequestMethod.DELETE)
    @ResponseBody
    //2.删除方法
    public String Delete(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("delete running ..."+id);
        return "delete running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.PUT)
    @ResponseBody
    //3.更新方法
    public String update(@RequestBody User user){
        System.out.println("update running ..."+user);
        return "update running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users",method = RequestMethod.GET)
    @ResponseBody
    //4.1 全体查询
    public String selectAll(){
        System.out.println("select running ...");
        return "select running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/users/{id}",method = RequestMethod.GET)
    @ResponseBody
    //4.2 根据条件查询
    public String selectById(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("select running ..."+id);
        return "select running";
    }

}

3 升级

  1. 提取重复代码

    • 提取请求配置地址和响应体

      @Controller
@ResponseBody
@RequestMapping("/users")
public class UserController {

    @RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.POST)
    public String save(){
        System.out.println("save running ...");
        return "save runnning";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/{id}",method = RequestMethod.DELETE)
    public String Delete(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("delete running ..."+id);
        return "delete running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.PUT)
    public String update(@RequestBody User user){
        System.out.println("update running ..."+user);
        return "update running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.GET)
    public String selectAll(){
        System.out.println("select running ...");
        return "select running";
    }

    @RequestMapping(value = "/{id}",method = RequestMethod.GET)
    public String selectById(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("select running ..."+id);
        return "select running";
    }

}

  2. 使用新注解

    • @RestController：整合 @Controller和 @ResponseBody的功能

    • @Post(Delete、Put、Get)Mapping：携带相应返回值信息的注解别名

      @RestController
@RequestMapping("/users")
public class UserController {

    @PostMapping
    public String save(){
        System.out.println("save running ...");
        return "save runnning";
    }

    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    public String Delete(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("delete running ..."+id);
        return "delete running";
    }

    @PutMapping
    public String update(@RequestBody User user){
        System.out.println("update running ..."+user);
        return "update running";
    }

    @GetMapping
    public String selectAll(){
        System.out.println("select running ...");
        return "select running";
    }

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public String selectById(@PathVariable Integer id){
        System.out.println("select running ..."+id);
        return "select running";
    }

}

entry.title: SSM_Mybatis01
entry.content:
1 MyBatis入门

1.1 MyBatis开发步骤

  1. 添加Mybatis的坐标

    <!--1.mybatis相关驱动坐标-->
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId>
    <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId>
    <version>3.5.2</version>
</dependency>
<!--2.数据库相关驱动坐标-->
<dependency>
    <groupId>mysql</groupId>
    <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId>
    <version>8.0.22</version>
</dependency>
...

  2. 创建user数据表

    略

  3. 编写User实体类

    public class User {
    //1.User 属性
    private int id;
    private String name;
    private String password;

    @Override
    //2.toString 重写
	...	
    //3.getter and setter 方法
    ...
}

  4. 编写映射文件UserMapper.xml

    <!--1.映射文件约束头-->
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">

<!--2.mapper根标签-->
	<!--2.1 命名空间:与id属性一起构成查询标识-->
<mapper namespace="UserMapper">
<!--3.查询操作-->
	<!--3.1 id属性:调用操作时供session查询的具体标识,与命名空间一起使用-->
	<!--3.2 resultTyep:操作返回结果对应的实体类型-->
    <select id="findAll" resultType="com.ls0617.domain.User">
		<!--3.3 标签内部填写要执行的sql语句-->
        select * from user
    </select>
<!--4.插入操作-->
	<!--4.1 parameterType:操作调用参数对应的实体类型-->
    <insert id="save" parameterType="com.ls0617.domain.User">
		<!--4.2 标签内部的sql语句,使用#{?}的格式充当占位符 ?的名称与参数实体类中的属性一致-->
        insert into user values(#{id},#{name},#{password})
    </insert>
<!--5.更新操作-->
    <update id="update" parameterType="com.ls0617.domain.User">
        update user set name = #{name},password=#{password} where id=#{id}
    </update>
<!--6.删除操作-->
	<!--6.1 当所调用参数的类型为默认数据类型时,#{?}内"?"的值不作硬性要求-->
    <delete id="deleteById" parameterType="java.lang.Integer">
        delete from user where id=#{id}
    </delete>
</mapper>

  5. 编写核心文件SqlMapConfig.xml

    <!--1.核心文件约束头-->
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<!DOCTYPE configuration PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd">

<!--2.根标签-->
<configuration>

<!--3.properties标签:引用配置文件-->
	<!--3.1 resource:指明所引用的配置文件的文件位置及文件名-->
    <properties resource="jdbc.properties"/>

<!--4.typeAliases标签:为实体类设置别名-->
	<typeAliases>
	<!--4.1 type:实体类全限定名-->
	<!--4.2 alias:实体类别名-->
        <typeAlias type="com.ls0617.domain.User" alias="user"></typeAlias>
    </typeAliases>
<!--5.environments标签:配置数据库连接环境-->
	<!--5.1 default:默认环境-->
    <environments default="develoment">
		<!--5.2 id:当前所配置的环境名-->
        <environment id="develoment">
			<!--5.3 事务管理器设置-->
            <transactionManager type="JDBC"></transactionManager>
			<!--5.4 数据源设置-->
            <dataSource type="POOLED">
                <property name="driver" value="${jdbc.driver}"/>
                <property name="url" value="${jdbc.url}"/>
                <property name="username" value="${jdbc.username}"/>
                <property name="password" value="${jdbc.password}"/>
            </dataSource>
        </environment>
    </environments>
<!--6.mappers标签:配置映射文件的引入-->
    <mappers>
        <mapper resource="com/ls0617/mapper/UserMapper.xml"></mapper>
    </mappers>
</configuration>

  6. 编写测试类

    public class UserMapperTest {
    @Test
    //1.查询测试
    public void FindAlltest() throws IOException {
        //1.1 获取核心配置文件
        InputStream resource = Resources.getResourceAsStream("SqlMapConfig.xml");
        //1.2 根据配置文件信息创建session工厂对象
        SqlSessionFactory Factory = new SqlSessionFactoryBuilder().build(resource);
        //1.3 创建session对象
        SqlSession session = Factory.openSession();
        //1.4 调用查询方法,格式为"mapper命名空间+具体方法id"
        List<User> userlist = session.selectList("UserMapper.findAll");
        System.out.println(userlist);
		//1.5 关闭session
        session.close();
    }
    @Test
    //2.插入测试
    public void Savetest() throws IOException {
        //2.1 模拟创建User类对象
        User user = new User();
        user.setName("ttt");
        user.setPassword("12313");
		//2.2 创建session,具体过程同上
        ...
        //2.3 调用查询方法,插入user对象
        session.insert("UserMapper.save",user);
		//2.4 开启事务
        session.commit();
        //2.5 关闭session
        session.close();

    }
    @Test
    //3.更新测试
    public void Updatetest() throws IOException {
       //3.1 模拟创建User类对象
        User user = new User();
        user.setName("ttt");
        user.setPassword("12313");
		//3.2 创建session,具体过程同上
        ...
        //3.3 调用更新方法
        sqlSession.update("UserMapper.update",user);
        //3.4 开启事务
        session.commit();
        //3.5 关闭session
        session.close();
    }

    @Test
    //4.删除测试
    public void Deletetest() throws IOException {
        //3.1 创建session,具体过程同上
        ...
        //3.2 调用删除方法
        session.delete("UserMapper.deleteById",5);
        //3.3 开启事务
        session.commit();
        //3.4 关闭session
        session.close();
    }
}

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
